qa_criteria.warm_color_temperature: Image reads warm — ochre, terracotta, walnut, brass. Not cool/blue.
qa_criteria.deep_shadows_present: Intentional deep shadows visible. Not bright/flat lit.
qa_criteria.no_studio_white_background: No studio cyclorama, no white backdrop, no glossy retouch.
qa_criteria.no_direct_eye_contact: No faces looking at camera. Keeps work allusive, not personal.
qa_criteria.no_competing_brand_logos: No visible competing brand names, labels, or logos.
qa_criteria.no_location_signage: No readable location-specific signs or geographic identifiers.
qa_criteria.consistent_with_vura_mood: Feels like subko.coffee — documentary, slow, craft, warm.
qa_criteria.correct_aspect_ratio: File matches expected aspect ratio (4:5, 3:2, or 1:1).
qa_criteria.no_stereotyped_indian_aesthetic: No mandala overlays, color-powder explosions, or exotic-decoration tropes.

assets.subject: Hands cradling raw mineral crystal, walnut wood, brass tray, window light
assets.notes: Excellent. Hands mid-action, deep shadows, brass tray visible, forest-green drapery in bg.

assets.subject: Workshop bench, amber bottles, paper labels, brass measure, overhead lamp, hands working
assets.notes: CAUTION: Bottle labels have readable text (Lavender Tincture, Calendula Oil etc). Acceptable for now as brand-neutral craft context, but commission Vura-specific photography for production.

assets.subject: Apothecary bottle on linen, aloe sprig, dried rose, forest green drape
assets.notes: CAUTION: Bottle has placeholder label text 'ASTRINGENT / ALOE & ROSE WATER'. Perfect composition and mood. Replace with Vura phitkari-label.png overlay in production, or commission real product photography.

assets.subject: Hands sorting damask rose petals, linen, wicker basket, golden morning light
assets.notes: Slightly brighter than ideal (Vura prefers deeper shadows). Golden morning light is on-brand. Acceptable for secondary/editorial use.

assets.subject: Copper distillation vessel, steam, brick walls, window light, dust motes
assets.notes: Excellent. Cinematic and documentary. Deep shadows, brick architecture, copper warmth, steam. Strong for 'The Process' editorial section.

assets.subject: Pressed herbarium specimen, calendula + rose, metal clip, wooden table, window light
assets.notes: CAUTION: Specimen card has readable text — 'HERBARIUM', 'Calendula Officinalis', 'Rosa Damascena', 'Collected: June 2023, Somerset'. The location (Somerset) is a specific geographic marker which is off-brand per PHOTOGRAPHY.md. Use for internal reference / mood board. Do not ship as-is. Regenerate with no readable text for production.

next_steps: Crop all assets to correct aspect ratios (4:5, 3:2, 1:1) before use
Regenerate vura-specimen-tall without readable location text for production
Replace placeholder bottle label with Vura phitkari-label overlay
Commission real product photography for production launch
Run qa-assets.sh before any theme deployment
